title: Color transformation using non-uniformly sampled multi-dimensional lookup table
abstract: Embodiments provide for a graphics processing apparatus comprising a graphics processing unit including color conversion logic to convert from a first color to a second color using a non-uniformly sampled multi-dimensional lookup table. In one embodiment, the graphics processing logic additionally includes lookup table generation logic to generate the non-uniformly sampled multi-dimensional lookup table, where the lookup table logic includes a color transform unit to transform color data for a pixel from the first color to the second color, a sampling point unit to compute a set of non-uniform sampling points in the first color, and a lookup table sampler unit to generate the multi-dimensional lookup table for the second color using the non-uniform sampling points in the first color.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1 . A graphics processing apparatus comprising: a graphics processing unit including color space conversion logic to convert from a first color space to a second color space using a non-uniformly sampled multi-dimensional lookup table. 2. The apparatus as in claim 1 , additionally comprising lookup table generation logic to generate the non-uniformly sampled multi-dimensional lookup table 3. The apparatus as in claim 2, wherein the lookup table generation logic includes: a color transform unit to transform color data for a pixel from the first color space to the second color space; a sampling point unit to compute a set of non-uniform sampling points in the first color space; and a lookup table sampler unit to generate the multi-dimensional lookup table for the second color space using the non-uniform sampling points in the first color space. 4. The apparatus as in claim 3, additionally comprising a first set of registers to store color data for the lookup table. 5. The apparatus as in claim 4, additionally comprising a second set of registers to store sample points for the color data of the lookup table. 6. The apparatus as in claim 5, wherein each register in the second set of registers stores samples from multiple dimensions of the lookup table. 7. The apparatus as in claim 1 , wherein the multi-dimensional lookup table includes at least one dimension per color channel of the first color space. 8. The apparatus as in claim 1 , wherein the first color is in a first color space and the second color is in a second color space. 9. The apparatus as in claim 8, wherein the first color space is an RGB based color space. 10. The apparatus as in claim 8, wherein the second color space is an RGB based color space. 1 1 . A computer-implemented method of generating lookup table data for color space conversion, the method comprising: determining a number of sample points for a color channel of a color space; dividing the color channel into multiple segments; computing multiple sample points within the multiple segments, the sample points for the multiple segments having a non-uniform spacing; sampling color data of the color channel at the sample points; and storing the sampled color data into the lookup table, wherein the lookup table is a non-uniformly sampled multi-dimensional lookup table, each dimension corresponding to a color channel. 12. The method as in claim 1 1 , further comprising computing sample points for each color channel of the color space based on a distance between color values in the color space, wherein a sample point is computed when the distance between color values exceeds a threshold. 13. The method as in claim 12, wherein the color space is a transformed color space and the distance between color values in the transformed color space is based on a difference between a color values for multiple channels of the transformed color space. 14. The method as in claim 12, wherein the threshold is tunable based on specified lookup table accuracy relative to lookup table size. 15. A non-transitory machine-readable medium storing instructions which, when executed by one or more processors, cause the one or more processors to perform operations comprising a method as in any one or claims 1 1 -14. 16. A graphics processing system comprising: a color transform unit to transform color data for a pixel from the first color space to the second color space; a sampling point unit to compute a set of non-uniform sampling points in the second color space; and a lookup table interpolation unit to generate color data for an output pixel based on the color data for an input pixel via the multi-dimensional lookup table. 17. The system as in claim 16, further comprising a lookup table sampler unit to generate the multi-dimensional lookup table using the non-uniform sampling points. 18. The system as in claim 16, wherein the color data for the input pixel data is between multiple sampling points and the lookup table interpolation unit is further to interpolate the color data for the output pixel based on data in the multidimensional lookup table using the multiple non-uniform sampling points. 19. The system as in claim 18, wherein the lookup table interpolation unit is to linearly interpolate the color data for the output pixel. 20. The system as in claim 17, wherein the color transform unit is to apply partial saturation enhancement during the transformation from the first color space to the second color space. 21 . The system as in claim 20, wherein the partial saturation enhancement to enhance green, cyan, and yellow pixels without enhancing red, green, and magenta pixels. 22. The system as in claim 16, wherein the sampling point unit is to compute sample points for each color channel of the second color space based on a distance between color values in the second color space. 23. The system as in claim 22, wherein the sampling point unit is further to: select a first color value having color data for each channel in the first color space; select a second color value adjacent to the first color value in the first color space; using the color transformation unit, compute a transformed first color value in the second color space and a transformed second color value in the second color space; compute a difference between the transformed first color value and the transformed second color value; and select a sampling point for a color channel in the first color space when the difference between the transformed first color value and the transformed second color value exceeds a threshold. 24. The system as in claim 23, wherein the sampling point unit is further to determine the difference between the transformed first color value and the transformed second color value based on values for multiple color channels. 

 The system as in claim 24, wherein the lookup table sampler unit is to store a transformed color value of the second color space in a multi-dimensional lookup table.
